title: BEM-1149 object runner
objective:
Create file governance/runners/object_lifecycle_runner.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

PASSPORTS_PATH = Path("governance/objects/object_passports.json")


def load_passports():
    data = json.loads(PASSPORTS_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return {item["id"]: item for item in data.get("objects", [])}


def validate_object_action(object_id, action):
    passports = load_passports()
    if object_id not in passports:
        return {"ok": False, "error": "unknown object"}
    passport = passports[object_id]
    allowed = set(passport.get("responsibilities", []))
    if action not in allowed:
        return {"ok": False, "error": f"action not allowed for {object_id}: {action}"}
    return {"ok": True, "object_id": object_id, "action": action}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    if len(sys.argv) != 3:
        print("usage: object_lifecycle_runner.py <object_id> <action>")
        raise SystemExit(2)
    result = validate_object_action(sys.argv[1], sys.argv[2])
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
